title: Single Page Scraper
description: Scrape one HTTP or HTTPS page and return cleaned content as text, Markdown, or HTML.

query.title: Page URL
query.description: The exact HTTP or HTTPS URL to scrape. This Actor does not run search queries or crawl additional pages.

id.title: Passthrough ID
id.description: Optional external ID that will be copied to the dataset output. Use this to match results back to your database row.

outputFormats.title: Output formats
outputFormats.description: Select one or more formats to save in the resulting dataset.

requestTimeoutSecs.title: Request timeout
requestTimeoutSecs.description: The maximum time in seconds available for loading and extracting the target page.

proxyConfiguration.title: Proxy configuration
proxyConfiguration.description: Apify Proxy configuration used for scraping the target page.

scrapingTool.title: Scraping tool
scrapingTool.description: Use Raw HTTP for static pages or Browser mode for JavaScript-heavy pages.

removeElementsCssSelector.title: Remove HTML elements (CSS selector)
removeElementsCssSelector.description: A CSS selector matching HTML elements that will be removed before converting the page to text, Markdown, or HTML.
removeElementsCssSelector.default:
nav, footer, script, style, noscript, svg, img[src^='data:'],
[role="alert"],
[role="banner"],
[role="dialog"],
[role="alertdialog"],
[role="region"][aria-label*="skip" i],
[aria-modal="true"]
removeElementsCssSelector.prefill:
nav, footer, script, style, noscript, svg, img[src^='data:'],
[role="alert"],
[role="banner"],
[role="dialog"],
[role="alertdialog"],
[role="region"][aria-label*="skip" i],
[aria-modal="true"]

htmlTransformer.title: HTML transformer
htmlTransformer.description: Choose whether to keep the cleaned DOM or extract readable article-like text.

desiredConcurrency.title: Desired concurrency
desiredConcurrency.description: The desired number of browser or HTTP workers. For a single URL, the default is 1.

maxRequestRetries.title: Page max retries
maxRequestRetries.description: The maximum number of times the Actor will retry loading the target page on error.

dynamicContentWaitSecs.title: Dynamic content timeout
dynamicContentWaitSecs.description: The maximum time in seconds to wait for dynamic page content when using Browser mode.

removeCookieWarnings.title: Remove cookie warnings
removeCookieWarnings.description: If enabled, the Actor attempts to close or remove cookie consent dialogs when using Browser mode.

debugMode.title: Enable debug mode
debugMode.description: If enabled, the Actor stores debugging information in the resulting dataset under the debug field.
